about.title: Who is Zaher? (really)
about.bio: Arrived in 2024 as a work-study student, Zaher is pursuing a Master 2 in Software and IT Design while putting his energy and rigor at the service of the agency. A junior full stack developer, he quickly specialized in the technical updating of CMS; WordPress and Joomla hold (almost) no secrets for him. Always attentive to details, he ensures that every site remains high-performing, secure, and perfectly functional. But Zaher doesn't limit himself to code. When he leaves his screen, it's often to return to another court… the padel court. A fearsome racket in hand, he puts as much intensity and strategy into his matches as he does into his development projects. And that, believe us, is anything but a coincidence.
about.hobbies: Beyond the screen: Padel, Boxing, Football & the gym — balance is non-negotiable. Also sharpening my English through reading: currently mid-way through 'The Housemaid's Secret' and at the Red Wedding in Game of Thrones.
